name: Pide with Minced Meat (Kıymalı Pide)
ingredients:
500g flour, 1 tsp salt, 1 tbsp sugar, 7g dry yeast, 300ml warm water, 3 tbsp olive oil.
Filling: 250g minced meat, 1 onion, 2 green peppers, 1 tomato, parsley, black pepper, cumin, paprika.
instructions:
Mix dough ingredients, knead 10 min, let rise 1 hour.
Sauté onion, add minced meat, peppers, tomato, spices.
Divide dough into 4, roll into oval shapes.
Spread filling, fold edges into a boat shape.
Bake at 220°C for 15 min. Serve with lemon.
